summary: PASS — All findings from v1 and v2 resolved. Clone family is complete: Data.Clone() is virtual, DataList<T>/PathData/IdentityData override it, Properties.Clone() deep-copies, MemoryStack.Clone() only shares SettingsData by reference. Security catch gaps fixed (DefaultEvaluator + Decompress). Documentation updated. Minor note: PathData/IdentityData Clone() don't copy base Error/Warnings/Signature fields but these are practically unused on MemoryStack-stored instances.

previous_reviews_assessed.tester: agree — PASS verdict correct, test coverage adequate

findings.issue: PathData.Clone() and IdentityData.Clone() don't copy base Data fields: Error, Handled, Warnings, Signature. Base Data.Clone() copies all of these.
findings.impact: Practically none — PathData/IdentityData stored in MemoryStack are successful results. Error goes through Data.FromError() (plain Data). Signature on a MemoryStack-stored PathData is extremely unlikely.
findings.suggestion: If these types ever carry errors or signatures, add the missing fields. Not blocking.
